title: unable to pass string concatenation to $display family of functions
body:
---


Author Name: **Johan Bjork**
Original Redmine Issue: 1043 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2016-03-01


---

```
module t();
     initial begin
     $display({"baz", "bar"});
  end
endmodule

```
Results in syntax error:
```
%Error: file.v:31: syntax error, unexpected '{', expecting STRING or ')'

```
